title: Create: Extra Additions
description: QoL mod that has compatibility with Create,  and Minecolonies, and even Farmer's Delight by the way you don't need those mods to benefit! Use this instead: https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-additions-revamped
body:
### **!IMPORTANT!** Use this instead if you are on 1.21.1, NeoForge: [https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-additions-revamped](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-additions-revamped) **It is still made by me, it will have more recipes, also more mod compatibility.**

Extra Additions aims to add a bunch of QoL features to multiple mods, and regular Minecraft, so you don't need any of the mods such as Create and Minecolonies to benefit, Current Features:

 1. Stone Sticks For Crafting
 2. Bell Recipe
 3. Prismarine Recipe
 4. Hammer Tool (and 2 recipes)
 5. Cobblestone Recipe
 6. Name Tag Recipe
 7. Wool and String Recipe
 8. Fried Eggs
 9. Create, Cinder Flour Automation
 10. Minecolones, Better Rack Recipe
 11. Saddle Recipe
 12. Create Leather Recipe
 13. Minecolonies Iron Scimitar Recipe
 14. Shaft Recipe
 15. Goggle Swtich (between Minecolonies and Create)
 16. Slimeball Recipe
 15. Blasting, Clay Ball to Brick
 16. Blasting, Clay Block to Bricks
 17. Lead Recipe
 18. Netherwart Block to 9 Netherwart
 19. Glow Frame Recipe, Item Frame + Glowstone Dust
 20. Raw Ore Block to Smelted Counterparts
 21. Smaller Andesite Alloy Recipe
 22. 2 Vine Recipes
 23. Rabbit Hide Recipe
 24. Cooking Pot Recipe
 25. Skillet Recipe
 26. Flattened Rotten Flesh Recipe
 27. 2 Blackstone Recipes
 28. Cobweb Recipe
 29. Cobweb To String Recipe
 30. 2 Gravel Recipes
 31. Debug stick recipe
 32. torch recipe with glowstone dust
 33. paper recipe with bamboo, also with one bamboo or one sugarcane for paper
 34. drying clay for bricks on a campfire
 35. drying wet sponges to normal sponges on a campfire
 36. any stone bricks can now be turned to stone with a hammer
 37. Feather and hammer makes string
 38. Bacon And Eggs can now be crafted with Extra Additions' fried eggs
 39. Egg Sandwichs can now be crafted with Extra Additions' fried eggs


That's all the current features, hammers are used to make cobblestone when combined with stone, and flattened rotten flesh, and that's it. Feel free to use in any modpacks, and always remember, Enjoy!
